verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Like the sun that rises everyday, You are so faithful. Lord, You are faithful. Like the rain that You send, And every breath that I breathe, You are so faithful, Lord

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Like the rose That comes alive every spring, You are so faithful. Lord, You are faithful. Like the life that You give, To every beat of my heart, You are so faithful, Lord.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I see the cross and the price You had to pay, I see the blood That washed my sins away.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: In the midst of the storm through the wind and the waves, You'll still be faithful, You'll still be faithful, When the stars refuse to shine And time is no more, You'll still be faithful, You'll still be faithful, Lord.
